calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-16-2024 Continued To Nov-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
William Markley, Esq., for Kenneth Cutler, Executor.

At the court's query, counsel offers clarification and advocacy regarding the request for extraordinary fees and confirms the number of hours he has spent on this matter. After additional discussion, the court instructs counsel to file a detailed supplement regarding the preceding on or before Oct-30-2024. The subject matter is continued to Nov-13-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Lopez. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-18-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-28-2024 Continued To Jun-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Markley appeared by zoom for Kenneth Cuttler (executor).

Mr. Markley stated that they discovered that there are to tax returns that have not been filed. Status on close of estate is continued to June 18, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court advised Mr. Markley that a petition for approval of a report on status of administration must be filed one week prior if a petition for final distribution is not ready to be filed.

Judge: Roger T. Picquet. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-26-2024 Continued To May-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Markley appeared via zoom for Kenneth Cutler (petitioner).

Mr. Markley stated that he is waiting to file final accounting , that taxes for 2023 were filed, and that he is waiting to receive them back. Status hearing on filing either a petition for final distribution or report of status of administration is continued to May 28, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Papers to be filed by May 14, 2024.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Jaime: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-27-2024 Continued To Mar-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was called, and passed, as no appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The matter was subsequently recalled, and no appearance was made at that time. However, the court was abruptly evacuated due to a fire alarm.

After consideration of the above by the court, the Status on Close of Estate is continued to Mar-26-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Maloney. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-30-2024 Continued To Feb-27-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-26-2023 Continued To Jan-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-07-2023 Continued To Dec-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: William Markley appeared via zoom for Kenneth Cutler (petitioner).

Mr. Markely stated that it took months to go thru his client's belongings, that he hopes to file the inventory and appraisal in few weeks, and that he also needs to file the 2023 tax returns. Status hearing on close of estate is continued to December 26, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Papers to be filed by December 12, 2023.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Prieto: Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-25-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Markley, via Zoom, for Kenneth Cutler, Petitioner.

The court and counsel discuss counsel's efforts with searching for potential heirs in this matter with the court stating that it seems strange that information regarding the decedent's mother's death is unavailable. Counsel reports that the only information found on the mother's death is her date of death which by itself is not enough information to conduct a thorough search. The court confirms with counsel that Douglas Ruhlmant and John Weinstein are adults. After additional discussion, the court confirms that no one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Sep-24-2006 is admitted to probate. Kenneth R. Cutler is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $50,000. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Nov-07-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Sep-27-2022 Continued To Oct-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-26-2022 Continued To Sep-27-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Markley, via Zoom, for Kenneth Cutler, Petitioner.

Counsel reports of recently receiving information regarding decedent's maternal side. The court confirms that it anticipates setting bond in this matter at $50k and that it expects clarification regarding the paternal side and of the formal filing of documentation regarding efforts regarding the maternal side.

The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed is continued to Sep-27-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
